site.title: International Accessibility Task Force chu
site.tagline: Accessibility mamawhna aṭangin public repo thlengin
nav.label: Primary
meta.home.description: IATF chuan accessibility mamawh tak takte chu public open source repository-ah a chantîr a.
meta.projects.description: IATF kaltlanga public accessibility project chhuahte enfiah rawh.
meta.propose.description: Web, email, emaw, Discord hmangin IATF aṭangin Accessibility project dil rawh.
meta.governance.description: IATF-in project a pawm dân te, repository a enkawl dânte, leh hna a tihchhuah dânte chhiar rawh.
meta.join.description: IATF-a tel theih dânte: code thawh, lehlin, test emaw, project enkawl emaw.
meta.accessibility.description: IATF-in he website-a luh theih reng a tum dan leh luh theih lohna a awm chuan engtin nge a report theih ang?
meta.transparency.description: IATF public records: thutlukna te, project te leh update te chu default-in hawn reng a ni.
registry.empty.title: Project tihchhuah a la awm lo
registry.empty.body: IATF chuan a public project set hmasa ber chu a buatsaih mek a ni.
proposal.form.title: Dilna thawn rawh
proposal.form.body: IATF-a dilna thawn turin a hnuaia form hi lo la rawh.
proposal.form.noscript: He web form hmang tur hian JavaScript a ngai a. A hman theih loh chuan email emaw, Discord emaw hmang ang che.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Live submission hi he environment-ah hian configure a ni lo. He form hian i email client a hawng ang.
proposal.form.loadingProtection: Chhuah luhna him buatsaih a ni e...
proposal.form.ready: Secure submission chu a peih tawh a. I request i thawn veleh IATF chuan intake record a siam ang.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: A thawn hmain spam venna check hi ti famkim ang che.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Spam venhimna hman a ni tawh lo. Send hmain check leh rawh.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Spam venhimna chu tunah hian enfiah theih a ni lo.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Spam venhimna hun a ral ta. Check leh chhin rawh.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Send hmain required field-te hi lo ti famkim ang che.
proposal.form.success: I dîlna chu kan dawng a, ennawn nân kan dah reng a ni.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: He dilna chungchangah IATF i biak leh a nih chuan a hnuaia reference hi dah rawh.
proposal.form.errorGeneric: A dilna thawn lai hian thil a lo dik lo hle a. Please try again. Harsatna a awm chhunzawm a nih chuan email hmang ang che.
project.detail.problemTitle: He project hian eng harsatna nge a chinfel?
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: English source, a hnu lamah lehlin belh theih a ni
footer.label: Site hnuailam
footer.blurb: Accessibility hna thawh ṭan a awlsam tûr a ni a, tichhuak a awl tûr a nih bawk a, inhawng reng a awlsam tûr bawk a ni.
footer.source: Accessibility standard reference: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/). Assistive technology hmangtute'n thil an tih dan.
contact.label: Inbiakpawhna
translation.label: Thu lehlin dinhmun
translation.source: He lehkhabuah hian English hi kanonical source language a ni a.
translation.humanReviewed: He lehlin hi ṭawng thiam tak chuan a ennawn a ni.
translation.machineAssisted: He lehlin hi machine-assisted a ni a, tawng thiam chuan a la enfiah zo lo a ni.
translation.needsUpdate: He lehlin hi English source update hnuhnûng ber a nih hmain ennawn a ni a, ennawnna a ngai mai thei a ni.
translation.report: A lehlin chungchângah report rawh: {{contact.i18nEmail}}A va lawmawm ve .
